summary:
You are given a string s and a list of words wordDict. Determine whether s can be split into a sequence of one or more words, where every piece appears in the dictionary.

Dictionary words may be reused as many times as needed. Return true if such a segmentation exists and false otherwise.

examples.explanation: "leetcode" splits into "leet" + "code", both in the dictionary.
No arrangement of dictionary words spells out the full string.

constraints: s and the dictionary words contain only lowercase English letters
Each dictionary word can be used multiple times
